title: Book Review: The Regulation of Prostitution in China: Law in the Everyday Lives of Sex Workers, Police Officers, and Public Health Officials By Margaret L. Boittin and Unlocking the Red Closet: Gay Male Sex Workers in China By Eileen Yuk-ha Tsang The Regulation of Prostitution in China: Law in the Everyday Lives of Sex Workers, Police Officers, and Public Health Officials. By BoittinMargaret L.Cambridge: Cambridge University Press, 2024, 398 pp., $120.00 (hardcover); $135.00 (e-book).Unlocking the Red Closet: Gay Male Sex Workers in China. By TsangEileen Yuk-ha. New York: New York University Press, 2025, 240 pp., $89.00 (hardcover); $30.00 (paperback, e-book).
